text.title: AI Interview Analysis Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the ai-interview-analysis methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Transcription MUST be the first pipeline stage; coding from raw audio is forbidden.
Every theme MUST carry ≥2 verbatim quotes from distinct interviews.
Themes MUST be synthesised across ≥3 interviews to count.
≥10 % of agent-coded themes MUST be human-reviewed before publish.
Each theme MUST carry a confidence label (High / Medium / Low).
rule.rationale: Without confidence, themes get equal weight in PRDs.

rule.statement: When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
